# IntentLayer
Prompt compiler middleware for coding agents.
## Important files
- README.md — overview and CLI usage
- BUILD_STATUS.md — phase history and test status
- docs/PRIVATE_DOGFOOD.md — private usage guide
- docs/DOGFOOD_CHECKLIST.md — dogfood checklist
- docs/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md — release checklist
- src/main.rs — CLI entrypoint
- src/compiler.rs — compiler output contract
- src/classifier.rs — mode/category classification
- src/llm_config.rs — env-only provider config
- src/openrouter.rs — OpenRouter provider
- src/groq.rs — Groq provider
- scripts/build-release.sh — release artifact script
## Common commands
cargo test
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo build --release
intentlayer --prompt "fix parser bug" --compiled-only
intentlayer --input request.json --compiled-only
## Notes
Use --input for large prompts.
Use --compiled-only for agent handoff.
Live providers require feature flags and env-backed API keys.
